name: Deep-Fried Squid
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Squid, cleaned and cut into rings
Flour for coating, at least 3 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil to 350°F in a deep-fat fryer or heavy casserole. If you don't have a temperature control or thermometer, drop a few drops of water into the oil; it should sizzle immediately on contact.
2. Coat squid rings with flour mixed with salt and pepper.
3. Using a basket, carefully lower the coated squid into the hot oil.
4. Fry until the coating turns golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
5. Remove the squid from the oil using a large spoon or tongs and drain on paper towels.
6. Turn down the heat to moderate until ready for the next batch; draining excess oil prevents overheating.
7. Serve hot with dipping sauces like those described below or lemon wedges, and coleslaw.
